mechanism: Inhibits FLT3-ITD and other tyrosine kinases to block AML cell signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; active against FLT3-ITD and resistant FLT3 mutants; activity in MOLM13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 (and KIT/VEGFR) signaling in AML cells
additional_notes: Approved for RCC, GIST; reduces viability in FLT3-ITD AML including MOLM13

mechanism: Inhibits MET, VEGFR, AXL, and FLT3 including D835 mutants
additional_notes: Approved for RCC and thyroid cancer; active in MOLM13/MOLM14

mechanism: Blocks SRC/ABL/KIT and inhibits FLT3/KIT-driven signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; decreases viability in AML lines including MOLM13 in some studies

mechanism: Covalent BTK inhibitor with off-target FLT3 inhibition in AML
additional_notes: Approved for CLL/MCL/WM; activity in MOLM13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases, altering transcription and inducing apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma; potent in AML including MOLM13; synergy with TKIs reported

mechanism: HDAC inhibition leading to apoptosis in AML cells
additional_notes: Approved for CTCL/PTCL; potent activity in FLT3-ITD models

mechanism: Reversibly inhibits the 26S proteasome causing proteotoxic stress and apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma/MCL; low-nM apoptosis in MOLM13/MV4-11; synergy with other agents

mechanism: Irreversible proteasome inhibitor inducing apoptotic cell death
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma; potent cytotoxicity in AML including MOLM13

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, increasing ROS and inducing apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; active in AML including MOLM13

mechanism: Inhibits STAT5 signaling downstream of FLT3-ITD
additional_notes: Antipsychotic repurposed; activity in FLT3-ITD AML including MOLM13

mechanism: Blocks mitochondrial translation and impairs OXPHOS in AML cells
additional_notes: Selectively targets AML stem/progenitor cells; reduces viability in MOLM13

mechanism: Modulates Wnt/STAT3/mTOR signaling and mitochondrial function
additional_notes: Induces apoptosis and inhibits proliferation in AML including MOLM13

mechanism: ALDH inhibition; with copper forms complexes that disrupt proteostasis and elevate ROS
additional_notes: Also called DSF; potency markedly enhanced with supplemental Cu(II); higher ranges needed without copper; activity reported in FLT3-ITD lines

mechanism: Induces ER stress/UPR leading to apoptosis in AML cells
Affects Wnt/NF-κB signaling and mitochondrial function
additional_notes: Anti-leukemia activity including AML stem/progenitors; activity in MOLM13 reported in screens

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial complex III to impair oxidative phosphorylation
additional_notes: Clinically achievable exposures overlap effective range; reduces viability in MOLM13
